That's everything needed. Here's the clear picture:

---

**They are two separate standalone systems with a one-way exit link only.**

**What exists:**

- `commons-server/src/index.ts` hosts both systems on the same server process. It serves the overworld WebSocket and also handles `/dungeon-ws` (dungeon WebSocket), `/api/clungiverse/lobby/create`, `/api/clungiverse/lobby/:id`, and `/api/clungiverse/lobby/:id/join`. The dungeon logic is a full subsystem at `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/dungeon/`...(truncated)
